schema: score 0-100 (50=neutral); direction positive|negative|neutral; materiality normal|material_negative|material_positive; confidence high|medium|low. EVENT signal only — no routine results/dividends (fundamentals layer covers those).

OGDC.summary: Bobi Deep-1 oil & gas discovery in Sindh (2,000 bpd + 1.1 MMSCFD) — fresh reserve-add catalyst.
headlines: Bobi Deep-1 in Sindh: OGDC makes significant oil and gas discovery

FCCL.summary: Partnering with KAPCO to acquire ~84% of Attock Cement via public offer — sector consolidation / capacity expansion.
headlines: Fauji Cement, KAPCO kick off Attock Cement takeover

MLCF.summary: Public offer for 69.75% of Pioneer Cement (~$270.5mn) — large M&A-led capacity expansion, sizeable capital outlay.
headlines: Maple Leaf Cement to acquire majority stake in Pioneer Cement for $270.5mn

PPL.summary: Added to JSMFI as leading constituent (19.65% weight) in the June 5 rebalancing — passive-flow tailwind.

DGKC.summary: Added to JSMFI (16.53% weight) in the June 5 rebalancing — passive-flow tailwind.

ATRL.summary: Removed from JSMFI effective June 5, 2026 — passive-flow headwind for refinery names.

NRL.summary: Removed from JSMFI effective June 5, 2026 — passive-flow headwind for refinery names.

PRL.summary: Removed from JSMFI effective June 5, 2026 — passive-flow headwind for refinery names.

SNGP.summary: Govt kept gas prices unchanged; SNGPL to work with OGRA on RLNG-to-domestic profit-calculation mechanism — regulatory uncertainty.
headlines: Gas prices kept unchanged: SNGPL, SSGCL will work with regulator on profit calculation

SSGC.summary: Govt gas-price freeze; SSGCL under the same OGRA profit-calculation review — sector pricing headwinds.
headlines: Gas prices kept unchanged: SNGPL, SSGCL will work with regulator on profit calculation

SAZEW.summary: Auto Policy 2016-21 concessional period ending June 2026; used-car imports at 40% regulatory duty may pressure local assembler volumes.
headlines: Sazgar Engineering Works Limited — BR Research
